summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Patek Shop Telegram e-commerce bot backend API and React admin panel. Backend API fully functional with 100% test success rate. Frontend admin panel working well with minor modal overlay issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay stays open and blocks interaction with other elements after opening add category modal
ui_bugs.description: Modal backdrop intercepts pointer events preventing clicks on other UI elements. Modal close functionality works but overlay remains blocking.

passed_tests: Backend API health endpoint returns OK
Backend API admin stats returns statistics with proper auth header
Backend API categories CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Backend API products CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Frontend navigation between all views (dashboard, categories, products, orders, users, tickets)
Frontend categories view displays 3 categories with proper data
Frontend products view displays 6 products with images and pricing
Frontend orders view has search and refresh functionality
Frontend users view displays empty state correctly
Frontend tickets view displays empty state correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal overlay issue in categories component - modal backdrop remains visible and blocks interactions after opening add category modal. The modal close button works but the overlay stays active.
